app.name: Business Reply Composer
app.tagline: Desktop AI demo that drafts context-aware email replies

main.title: Compose a reply
main.inputPlaceholder: Paste the received email body (10–8,000 characters)
main.extraPlaceholder: e.g. I want to confirm the deadline
main.modelLoading: Loading model… (this may take a while on first run)

history.title: Generation history
history.empty: No generation history in this session yet.

health.title: Health check
health.description: Checks that ollama is running and the recommended model is installed. If not, it is treated as an error with no fallback generation.

settings.title: Settings
settings.modelNote: Download models outside the app in advance (no in-app download).

error.too_short: The body must be at least 10 characters.
error.too_long: The body is too long; it will be summarized before processing.
error.ollama_down: ollama is not running. Please start it and try again.
error.model_missing: The recommended model is not installed. Install it and try again.
error.timeout: Generation timed out. Please try again.
error.structure_incomplete: The reply structure is partly incomplete (shown with a warning).
